name: Mercat de la Boqueria
summary: A reliable Saturday race-day food stop for portable fruit, sandwiches, snacks, and grazing before heading toward Montjuic.
whyItMatters: Stage 1 is a Saturday Barcelona day, and the official market hours line up well for a self-catered race-day kit before access gets complicated near the course.
pros: Large market with more than 200 traders according to the official site
Useful for quick provisions rather than committing to a sit-down meal
cons: Very tourist-heavy and can be crowded
Closed Sundays except special holiday openings, so not useful for Stage 2 Sunday unless a special opening is announced

logistics.reservation_needed: No for market shopping; individual bars/stalls may vary.
logistics.takeaway_options: Strong; market format supports fruit, bread, charcuterie, prepared bites, and other portable provisions.
logistics.distance_from_base: Unknown until lodging is confirmed; on La Rambla.
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Approximately 2-3 km from Montjuic Park depending on exact viewing point.
logistics.transit: Near Liceu metro; walking/taxi access depends on race-day closures.
logistics.road_closure_notes: No specific market closure found; verify city/TDF access plans before Stage 1.

timing.best_visit_window: Stage 1 morning or early lunch before moving to Montjuic.
timing.race_day_risk: Medium: market should be open Saturday, but crowds and city race access may slow movement.

sources.title: Boqueria Market official website
sources.note: Supports address, opening hours, market scale, food categories, and online/merchant context.

open_questions: Check Barcelona race-day road and metro access once official city notices are available.
Identify specific stalls for takeaway sandwiches or picnic components if the group wants a more exact shopping plan.
